VehicleType.description: A classification of public transport vehicles according to the vehicle scheduling requirements in mode and capacity (e.g. standard bus, double-deck, ...).

ClassifiedAsRef.description: Classification of type as being of a particular VEHICLE MODEL.

capacities.description: Break down of Capacities by FARE CLASS.

Monitored.description: Whether real-time data is normally available for the VEHICLE TYPE (this can be the vehicle position, but also the speed, charging level, passenger counting, etc.).

LowFloor.description: Whether Vehicle is low floor to facilitate access by the mobility impaired.

HasLiftOrRamp.description: Whether vehicle has lift or ramp to facilitate wheelchair access.

HasHoist.description: Whether vehicle has hoist for wheelchair access.

HoistOperatingRadius.description: Distance from VEHICLE needed to operate hoist.

GapToPlatform.description: Expected maximal gap between VEHICLE and platform. +v1.1

Length.description: The length of a VEHICLE of the type.

Width.description: The width of a VEHICLE of the type. +v1.1

Height.description: The height of a VEHICLE of the type. +v1.1

Weight.description: The weight of a VEHICLE of the type. +v1.1

FirstAxleHeight.description: The height of the first axle of a VEHICLE of the type.

canCarry.description: Capacity that VEHICLE TYPE should meet - indicates minimum number of seats of each type.

canManoeuvre.description: Manoeuvring capabilities that VEHICLE TYPE should meet.

satisfiesFacilityRequirements.description: FACILITIES requirements that VEHICLE TYPE should meet.

TransportMode.description: PT MODE associated with VEHICLE TYPE. +v1.2.2

ReversingDirection.description: Whether vehicles of the type have a reversing direction.

SelfPropelled.description: Whether vehicles of the type are self-propelled.

PropulsionTypes.description: List of types of power used +v2.0

FuelTypes.description: The list of types of fuel used by a vehicle of the type. +v2.0

FuelType.description: The type of fuel used by a vehicle of the type. DEPRECATED -v2.0

TypeOfFuel.description: The type of fuel used by a vehicle of the type. DEPRECATED NAME 1.2.2. Use FuelType. -v2.0

PassengerCapacity.description: Total Number of passengers that VEHICLE TYPE can carry.

keyList.description: A list of alternative Key values for an element.

privateCodes.description: A list of private codes that uniquely identifiy the element. May be used for inter-operating with other (legacy) systems. +v2.0

responsibilitySetRef.description: Reference to RESPONSIBILITY SET for managing the object. If absent, then responsibility is same as for containing context of this object.

DataManagedObjectStructure.description: Abstract Type for a MANAGED OBJECT.

dataSourceRef.description: Name of source of the data.

changed.description: Date ENTITY or version was last changed.

modification.description: Nature of last modification: new, revise, delete, unchanged, delta. Default is "new".

version.description: Version number of entity. The value may be "any" or a VERSION number adhering to agreed-upon formatting and interpretation rules (representing, e.g., a number or a date). Consecutive VERSION numbers should be strictly increasing.

status.description: Whether ENTITY is currently in use. Default is "active".

derivedFromVersionRef.description: Version of this object from which this version of ENTITY was derived.

compatibleWithVersionFrameVersionRef.description: Version of frame from with which this version of ENTITY is compatible. Assumes Frame of the same Id as current frame.

derivedFromObjectRef.description: Identity of object from which this object of ENTITY was derived. Normally the same.

nameOfClass.description: Name of Class of the ENTITY. Allows reflection. Fixed for each ENTITY type.

NameOfClass.description: Type for name of all classes within NeTEx.

ObjectIdType.description: Abstract Type for identifier of a NeTEx Object.

AlternativeText.description: ALTERNATIVE TEXT for a text attribute of Element.

alternativeTexts_RelStructure.description: Type for list of ALTERNATIVE TEXTs

strictContainmentAggregationStructure.description: Type for an Implementation of a strict aggregate relationship by value, where the contained element is a child of the parent. A one to many relationship from the source, the containing parent, to the child instance.

relationshipStructure.description: Abstract Type for a serialisation of a NeTEx relationship.

RelationshipId.description: Type for Identifier of a relationship.

DataManagedObjectRef.description: Object for attribute for which ALTERNATIVE TEXT provides an alias. May be omitted if given by context.

attributeName.description: Name of text attribute for which this is the alternative text. Must be an existing attribute name.

useForLanguage.description: Name of language for which this is to be used.

Extensions.description: User defined Extensions to ENTITY in schema. (Wrapper tag used to avoid problems with handling of optional 'any' by some validators).

nameOfRefClass.description: Name of Class of the referenced entity. Allows reflection. Fixed for each entity type.

modification.description: Nature of last modification: new, revise, delete, unchanged.

versionRef.description: Identifier of version of referenced entity. For use when reference is External and a specific version is required. Mutually exclusive with version

VersionOfObjectRefStructure.description: Type for a versioned reference to a NeTEx Object.

ModificationEnumeration.description: Classification of modification as addition, deletion or revision. Enumerated value.

VersionIdType.description: A revision identifier (e.g. a number) that should be updated (e.g. increased) each time the unit that is refers to is modified.

MultilingualString.description: *Either* use with simple text (as in NeTEx prior to v2.0) or use *only* Text elements within the MultilingualString. The old version (simple text) will be deprecated. As this is a mixed type this is not currently enforced by the schema.

validityConditions_RelStructure.description: A collection of one or more VALIDITY CONDITIONs.

modificationSet.description: Whether this is a list of all (revise) or just changes.

containmentAggregationStructure.description: Type for an Implementation of an aggregate relationship by reference or value, where the contained element or reference is included in the XML as a child of the parent.

ModificationSetEnumeration.description: Classification of modification as addition, deletion, revision or delta only. Enumerated value.

ValidityTriggerRef.description: Reference to a VALIDITY TRIGGER An External event defining a VALIDITY CONDITION. E.g. exceptional flow of a river, bad weather, Road closure for works.

ValidityConditionRefStructure.description: Type for a reference to a VALIDITY CONDITION.

ValidityRuleParameterRef.description: Reference to a VALIDITY RULE PARAMETER. A user defined VALIDITY CONDITION used by a rule for selecting versions.

AvailabilityConditionRef.description: Reference to an AVAILABILITY CONDITION. A VALIDITY CONDITION defined in terms of temporal attributes.

ValidBetween.description: OPTIMISATION. Simple version of a VALIDITY CONDITION. Comprises a simple period. NO UNIQUENESS CONSTRAINT.

ToDate.description: End of AVAILABILITY CONDITION. Date is INCLUSIVE.

ValidBetween_VersionStructure.description: Type for a Simple VALIDITY CONDITION.

ConditionedObjectRef.description: Entity to which condition specifically attaches.

WithConditionRef.description: CONDITION with which this rule is logically ANDed.

ValidityCondition_Dummy.description: Condition used in order to characterise a given VERSION of a VERSION FRAME. A VALIDITY CONDITION consists of a parameter (e.g. date, triggering event, etc) and its type of application (e.g. for, from, until, etc.).

ValidityTrigger.description: External event defining a VALIDITY CONDITION. E.g. exceptional flow of a river, bad weather, Road closure for works.

TriggerObjectRef.description: Entity on which Trigger is based - Trigger value is taken from it.

PrivateCode.description: A private code that uniquely identifies the element. May be used for inter-operating with other (legacy) systems.

ValidityRuleParameter.description: A user defined VALIDITY CONDITION used by a rule for selecting versions. E.g. river level > 1,5 m and bad weather.

RuleObjectRef.description: Entity on which Rules based - Trigger value is taken from it.

isValid.description: If the referenced element is currently valid.

AttributeName.description: Name of an Attribute of the referenced ENTITY which provides Trigger value.

ComparisonOperator.description: Comparison operator to be used when comparing the referenced attribute of to the Attribute Value : EQ, NE,GE, GT, LE,LT (equal, not equal, greater equal, greater than, lower equal, lower than).

Method.description: Method for computing an attribute. By default this will be as simple operator. Some systems may support additional means of comparison.

ValidityCondition.description: Condition used in order to characterise a given VERSION of a VERSION FRAME. A VALIDITY CONDITION consists of a parameter (e.g. date, triggering event, etc) and its type of application (e.g. for, from, until, etc.).

ValidDuring.description: OPTIMISATION: Sversion of an AVAILABILITY CONDITION Comprises a simple period and DAY TYPE.

Days.description: OPTIMIZATION week matrix Y | N, NNNNNNN.

ValidDuring_VersionStructure.description: Type for a SIMPLE TIMEBAND AVAILABILITY CONDITION.

Timeband.description: A period in a day, significant for some aspect of public transport, e.g. similar traffic conditions or fare category.

timebands_RelStructure.description: Type for a list of TIMEBANDs.

StartEvent.description: Event marking start of timeband, e.g., dusk, dawn. +v1.2.2

Duration.description: Interval from start at which TIME BAND ends. If omitted, the TIME BAND ends at the end of day.

DayOffset.description: Number of days after start time that end time is.

EndEvent.description: Event marking end of timeband, e.g., dusk, dawn. +v1.2.2

DaysOfWeekListOfEnumerations.description: Allowed values for list of days of the week.

DayOfWeekEnumeration.description: Allowed values for day of the week.

SimpleAvailabilityCondition.description: Simple version of an AVAILABILITY CONDITION used in order to characterise a given VERSION of a VERSION FRAME. Comprises a simple period and DAY TYPE.

AvailabilityCondition.description: VALIDITY CONDITION stated in terms of DAY TYPES and PROPERTIES OF DAYs.

IsAvailable.description: Whether condition makes resource available or not available. Default is available.

ValidDayBits.description: For UIC style encoding of day types String of bits, one for each day in period: whether valid or not valid on the day. Normally there will be a bit for every day between start and end date. If bit is missing, assume available.

DayType_Dummy.description: A type of day characterized by one or more properties which affect public transport operation. For example: weekday in school holidays.

dayTypes_RelStructure.description: Type for a list of DAY TYPEs.

OrganisationDayType.description: DAY TYPE defined as being available on days when ORGANISATION is open and requires service.

DayLength.description: Length of day. Used to work out Latest time that day runs to.

propertiesOfDay_RelStructure.description: Type for a list of properties of day.

PropertyOfDay.description: A property which a day may possess, such as school holiday, weekday, summer, winter etc.

DaysOfWeek.description: Days of week Monday to Sunday, Everyday. Up to seven allowed. Default is Everyday.

HolidayTypes.description: Type of holiday. Default is Any day.

MonthOfYear.description: For those day types that occur on the same month every year; a month as a number.

DayOfMonth.description: For those day types that occur on the same day of the month every year; a a as a number.

DayOfYear.description: For those day types that occur on the same day every year, month and day,

WeeksOfMonthListOfEnumerations.description: Allowed values for List of Weeks of the month.

WeekOfMonthEnumeration.description: Allowed values for Week of the Month.

CountryRefStructure.description: Type for a reference to a Country Identifier.

CountryPrincipalityCodeType.description: Type for Country Identifier. ISO 3166-2 (3 character ISo code). +v1.1.

CountryCodeType.description: Type for Country Identifier. ISO 3166-1 (2 character ISO code).

PlaceIdType.description: Type for identifier of a PLACE.

GroupOfPointsIdType.description: Type for identifier of a GROUP OF POINTs.

HolidayTypesListOfEnumerations.description: Allowed values for Weeks of the month.

SeasonsListOfEnumerations.description: Allowed values for List of Seasons.

TidesListOfEnumerations.description: Allowed values for List of Tides.

OtherOrganisationRefStructure.description: Type for a reference to an OTHER ORGANISATION.

OrganisationRefStructure.description: Type for a reference to an ORGANISATION.

DayType.description: A type of day characterized by one or more properties which affect public transport operation. For example: weekday in school holidays.

operatingDays_RelStructure.description: Type for a list of OPERATING DAYs.

OperatingDay.description: A day of public transport operation in a specific calendar. An OPERATING DAY may last more than 24 hours.

CalendarDate.description: Actual Date of OPERATING DAY. Unique within SERVICE CALENDAR.

ServiceCalendarRef.description: Reference to parent SERVICE CALENDAR. If given by context, does not need to be given.

DayNumber.description: Day Number if different from Id.

DayLength.description: Length of day. Used to work out Latest time that day runs to.

DataSourceIdType.description: Type for identifier of a DATA SOURCE.

StatusEnumeration.description: Indicates whether the ENTITY this annotates is available for use. Use of this attribute allows entities to be retired without deleting the details from the dataset.

keyList.description: A list of alternative Key values for an element.

privateCodes.description: A list of private codes that uniquely identifiy the element. May be used for inter-operating with other (legacy) systems. +v2.0

TypeOfValueRefStructure.description: Type for a reference to a TYPE OF VALUE.

ResponsibilitySetIdType.description: Type for identifier of a RESPONSIBILITY SET.

AllPublicTransportModesEnumeration.description: PUBLIC TRANSPORT MODE: A MODE used for public transport services (e.g., by bus, by tram, by metro, by train, by ferry, by ship, by shared taxi car, by shared car) under either a CONVENTIONAL MODE OF OPERATION or an ALTERNATIVE MODE OF OPERATION (i.e., excluding a PERSONAL MODE OF OPERATION). Note: Prior to TM 6.2 this was named VEHICLE MODE.

PropulsionTypeListOfEnumerations.description: List of allowed values for propulsion type.

PropulsionTypeEnumeration.description: Allowed values for type of power. +v1.2.2

FuelTypeListOfEnumerations.description: List of allowed values for file type.

FuelTypeEnumeration.description: Allowed values for type of fuel.

DistanceType.description: Distance type for long distances. System for Units can e specified on frame (metres) as defined by http://www.ordnancesurvey.co.uk/xml/resource/units.xml#metres.

SpeedType.description: Speed type for velocity. System for units can be specified on frame. Normal default is metres per second as defined by http://www.ordnancesurvey.co.uk/xml/resource/units.xml#metres.

FareClass.description: Fare class for which capacity is specifyed. Default is any, i.e. capacity is for all FARE CLASSes.

TotalCapacity.description: The total capacity of vehicles of the type. For a requirement this is the minimum needed.

SeatingCapacity.description: The seating capacity of vehicles of the type. For a requirement this is the minimum needed.

StandingCapacity.description: The standing capacity of vehicles of the type. For a requirement this is the minimum needed.

SpecialPlaceCapacity.description: The number of special places on vehicles of the type, e.g. seats for the disabled. For a requirement this is the minimum needed.

PushchairCapacity.description: The number of push chair places on vehicles of the type. For a requirement this is the minimum needed.

WheelchairPlaceCapacity.description: The number of wheelchairs places on vehicles of the type. For a requirement this is the minimum needed.

PramPlaceCapacity.description: The number of places on the vehicle that are suitable for prams. +v2.0

BicycleRackCapacity.description: The number of bicycle racks on the vehicle. Also non-rack places should be counted here. The name might change in future to BicycleCapacity. +v2.0

VehicleTypeRefStructure.description: Type for a reference to a VEHICLE TYPE.

VehicleModelRefStructure.description: Type for a reference to a VEHICLE MODEL.

serviceFacilitySets_RelStructure.description: SERVICE FACILITY SETs associated with entity.

ServiceFacilitySetRef.description: Reference to a SERVICE FACILITY SET.

FacilitySetRefStructure.description: Type for a reference to a FACILITY SET.

ServiceFacilitySet.description: Service FACILITY. Set of enumerated FACILITY values (Where available names are based on TPEG classifications, augmented with UIC etc.).

onboardStays.description: Permission to stay on board the service.

AccessibilityToolList.description: List of TYPEs of ACCESSIBILITY TOOLs.

TypeOfFacilityRef.description: Reference to a TYPE OF FACILITY.

typesOfEquipment_RelStructure.description: Type for a list of TYPE OF Equipment.

modificationSet.description: Whether this is a list of all (revise) or just changes.

oneToManyRelationshipStructure.description: Type for an Implementation of a one to many relationship . A one to many relationship from the source (one) to the target (many)

TypeOfEquipmentRef.description: Reference to a TYPE OF EQUIPMENT. Some values are defined for EPIAP: "mobileRamp" for mobile Ramps, "permanentRamp" for permanent installation and "wheelchairLift" for a hoist.

TypeOfEquipment.description: A classification of a EQUIPMENT according to its functional purpose.

nameOfClassifiedEntityClass.description: Name of Class of the ENTITY. Allows reflection. Fixed for each ENTITY type.

TypeOfEntity_VersionStructure.description: Type for a TYPE OFENTITY. Abstract supertype used to define open classifications of value types.

ShortName.description: Short Name for TYPE OF VALUE.

Image.description: Default image for TYPE OF VALUE.

Url.description: Default URL for TYPE OF VALUE.

TypeOfValue_VersionStructure.description: Type for a TYPE OF VALUE. Abstract supertype used to define open classifications of value types.

CarServiceFacilityEnumeration.description: Allowed values for Car Service Facility.

CateringFacilityEnumeration.description: Allowed values for Catering Facility: TPEG pti_table 23.

ClimateControlEnumeration.description: Allowed values for Climate Control Facility.

LightingControlFacilityEnumeration.description: Allowed values for Lighting Control Facility.

MedicalFacilityEnumeration.description: Allowed values for Medical Service Facility.

MobilityFacilityEnumeration.description: Allowed values for Mobility Facility: TPEG pti_table 23.

NuisanceFacilityEnumeration.description: Allowed values for Nuisance Facility: TPEG pti_table 23.

PassengerCommsFacilityEnumeration.description: Allowed values for PASSENGER COMMUNICATIONS FACILITY.

PassengerInformationEquipmentListOfEnume.description: List of values for PASSENGER INFORMATION EQUIPMENT.

PassengerInformationEquipmentEnumeration.description: Allowed values for Passenger Information Equipment.

PassengerInformationFacilityEnumeration.description: Allowed values for Passenger information facility.

SanitaryFacilityEnumeration.description: Allowed values for Sanitary Facility Type.

TicketingServiceFacilityList.description: List of TICKETING SERVICE FACILITies, e.g. purchase, collection. top up.

accommodations_RelStructure.description: Type for containment in frame of SERVICE FACILITY SETs.

AccommodationFacility.description: Type of ACCOMMODATION. . Default is seating.

ClassOfUseRef.description: Reference to a CLASS OF USE.

AccommodationFacility.description: Classification of ACCOMMODATION FACILITY type - TPEG pti23.

CouchetteFacility.description: Classification of COUCHETTE FACILITY type - TPEG pti23.

CouchetteFacilityEnumeration.description: Allowed values for Couchette Facility: UIc.

BerthFacility.description: Classification of BERTHFACILITY type - TPEG pti23.

onboardStays_RelStructure.description: Type for containment in frame of SERVICE FACILITY SETs.

OnboardStay.description: Boarding permission to board early or stay on board late.

BoardingPermission.description: Type of Accommodation . Default is seating.

Period.description: Period allowed for boarding/ alighting before journey start /end.

BoardingPermission.description: Classification of BOARDING PERMISSION - UIC 7161 Code list.

VehicleAccessFacilityEnumeration.description: Allowed values for Vehicle Access Facility. NB. These are the properties of access to a VEHICLE. +1.1

BookingProcessFacilityList.description: List of BOOKING PROCESS FACILITies UIC 7037 Code list.

BookingProcessEnumeration.description: Allowed values for Booking Process UIC 7037 Code list.

GroupBookingFacility.description: Classification of GROUP FACILITY type - TPEG pti23.

LuggageCarriageEnumeration.description: Allowed values for Luggage Carriage Facility.

ServiceReservationFacilityList.description: List of RESERVATION FACILITies UIC 7037 Code list.

ReservationEnumeration.description: Allowed values for Reservation. UIC 7037 Code list.

UicProductCharacteristicList.description: List of UIC Product Characteristics UIC 7139 Code list.

UicProductCharacteristicEnumeration.description: UIC Product Characteristic UIC 7139 Code list.

UicTrainRate.description: Classification of UIC Rate Type FACILITY type - UIC 5163 Code list.

passengerCapacities_RelStructure.description: Type for a list of PASSENGER and PASSENGER VEHICLE CAPACITies.

PassengerCapacity.description: Total number of passengers that can be carried by a VEHICLE of this type.

PassengerVehicleCapacity.description: Total number of passenger vehicles s that can be carried by a VEHICLE of this type.

VehicleCategories.description: Vehicle categories for which capacity is specified. Default is allPassengerVehicles i.e. capacity is for all VEHICLE CATEGORIES

VehicleCapacity.description: The total capacity of passenger VEHICLES of the type. F

AllRoadVehicleCategoriesListOfEnumeratio.description: Allowed values for list of All road Wheeled VEHICLE types.+V2.0

PortableVehicleCategoryEnumeration.description: Allowed values for Portable VEHICLE types. +V2.0

PersonalVehicleCategoryEnumeration.description: Allowed values for Personal VEHICLE types.+V2.0

CommercialVehicleCategoryEnumeration.description: Allowed values for Wheeled commercial VEHICLE types.

NumberOfVehicles.description: Type for Number of Vehicles- capacity.

LengthType.description: Length type for short distances. System for Units can be specified on frame. Normally (metres) as defined by http://www.ordnancesurvey.co.uk/xml/resource/units.xml#metres.

WeightType.description: Weight type for mass. System for Units can be specified on Frame. Normal default is (kilos) as defined by http://www.ordnancesurvey.co.uk/xml/resource/units.xml#metres.

passengerCarryingRequirements_RelStructu.description: Type for a list of PASSENGER CARRYING Requirements.

PassengerCarryingRequirementRef.description: Reference to a PASSENGER CARRYING REQUIREMENT.

VehicleRequirementRefStructure.description: Type for a reference to a VEHICLE REQUIREMENT.

PassengerCarryingRequirement.description: Requirements for carrying passengers on a service.

LowFloor.description: Whether Vehicle is low floor to facilitate access by the mobility impaired.

HasLiftOrRamp.description: Whether vehicle has lift or ramp to facilitate wheelchair access.

HasHoist.description: Whether vehicle has hoist for wheelchair access.

HoistOperatingRadius.description: Distance from VEHICLE needed to operate hoist.

GapToPlatform.description: Expected maximal gap between VEHICLE and platform. +v1.1

VehicleManoeuvringRequirement.description: An area within a Site. May be connected to Quays by PATH LINKs.

vehicleManoeuvringRequirements_RelStruct.description: Type for a list of PASSENGER CARRYING REQUIREMENTs.

VehicleManoeuvringRequirementRef.description: Reference to a VEHICLE MANOEUVRING REQUIREMENT.

MinimumTurningCircle.description: Minimum distance needed to turn vehicle.

MinimumLength.description: Minimum distance needed to accommodate vehicle.

facilityRequirements_RelStructure.description: Type for a list of FACILITY REQUIREMENTs.
